title: Saadaasha Lacagta 13-Toddobaad
subtitle: 4 dhab ah · 9 la saadaaliyay
ask_prompt: Saadaashayda lacagta ee 13-toddobaad waxay muujinaysaa: baaqiga hadda {balance}, lacagta ugu hooseysa ee la saadaaliyay {lowest} (toddobaadka {week}). Celceliska soo gelidda toddobaadlaha {avgIn}, celceliska ka baxidda {avgOut}. Maxaan sameeyaa si aan u horumariyo waqtiga lacagtaydu igu filan tahay?
forecast_note: Saadaashu waxay ku salaysan tahay celceliska toddobaadlaha ee hore. Ku dar deymaha laguu leeyahay/aad leedahay si aad u daraysid socodka lacagta la ogyahay.
negative_warning: ⚠ Lacagtu waxay noqonaysaa taban toddobaadka {week} — waa in tallaabo la qaadaa
